summary: Backend: 10/10 pytest cases pass for profiles, mappings, helper telemetry, MIDI events, helper state and script download. Frontend: Dashboard, header, helper-status, MIDI LEARN/SETUP buttons render. Hardware visualizer renders complete: 16 pads, 8 knobs, 37 keys, all 4 transport buttons, mod-wheel, pitch-wheel. Mapping dialog opens correctly on clicking any control and shows the control name. HOWEVER a CRITICAL frontend dev-mode overlay blocks the UI after the first interaction with Radix Select inside the Mapping Dialog: 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' is surfaced as a CRA dev error overlay covering the entire screen — preventing the SAVE click (mapping never persisted; backend list empty after attempted save). All subsequent flows (mapping delete via UI, profile create via UI, MIDI-learn auto-open, helper-online status reflection, setup page nav) were blocked by this overlay and could not be validated end-to-end. Setup page nav was not reached.

ui_bugs.issue: Triggering the action-type Select inside the Dialog raises 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' which CRA dev overlay treats as an uncaught runtime error, blanket-covering the screen and blocking SAVE/Delete clicks. Mapping is NOT persisted (verified: GET /api/profiles/{id}/mappings returns [] after attempted save).

Frontend is being served with the CRA dev overlay enabled in the preview URL. Benign ResizeObserver warnings from Radix get promoted to a fullscreen error overlay, making the app unusable in this environment.
Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent' — add DialogDescription or aria-describedby for accessibility.

integration_issues.issue: Backend never receives PUT /api/profiles/{id}/mappings/knob-1 (mappings list stays empty). Likely because Save click is intercepted by the dev error overlay, OR the action_type select value isn't propagating before clicking Save.

integration_issues.flow: MIDI learn auto-open / Profile create / Setup page
integration_issues.issue: Not validated end-to-end because of the blocking dev error overlay following the first dialog interaction.

action_items: Suppress benign ResizeObserver warnings so CRA dev overlay doesn't blanket the UI. Options: (a) add a window error handler in index.js that swallows 'ResizeObserver loop completed/limit exceeded' messages and calls stopImmediatePropagation; (b) disable react-error-overlay via FAST_REFRESH=false / process.env.NODE_ENV='production' build; (c) wrap Radix Select with a ResizeObserver-safe variant. This is blocking nearly all UI flows.
Re-verify Save Mapping persistence after the overlay fix — confirm PUT hits /api/profiles/{id}/mappings/{control_id} and the control gets the orange/assigned border styling.
Add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to MappingDialog to satisfy Radix a11y warning.
Re-run MIDI-learn flow: enable learn -> POST /api/helper/midi-event -> verify dialog auto-opens for the reported control_id.
Validate /setup page renders all 6 steps and download-script-btn href ends with /api/helper/script and code blocks show REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: helper_status uses datetime.fromisoformat on stored ISO — fine because now_iso emits +00:00; OK.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI on_event hooks (startup/shutdown). Migrate to lifespan handlers for FastAPI >=0.110.
Mapping upsert uses both update_one(upsert=True) and pre-fetch — works but is redundant; can simplify.
helper script endpoint reads file on every request — fine for small file, but consider caching.
No auth on /api/helper/* — acceptable for MVP but anyone with the URL can spoof helper state/sessions.
Frontend MappingDialog appears to call Select inside a Dialog (Radix) which is known to throw ResizeObserver warnings; wrap with try/catch or upgrade Radix versions.

success_rate.frontend: ~40% (rendering + dialog open OK; save/delete/profile-create/midi-learn/setup blocked by dev overlay)

seed_data_creation: Default profile auto-seeded by backend startup; tests create and clean up TEST_-prefixed profiles.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid; do not re-run backend unless code changes. Focus on frontend after the ResizeObserver/error-overlay is suppressed. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. To simulate the Windows helper, POST to /api/helper/heartbeat (every <8s for 'online'), /api/helper/sessions, /api/helper/midi-event. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_launchkey_api.py (run: pytest backend/tests/test_launchkey_api.py).
